name: Cucumber Kimchi (Oi Sobagi Kimchi)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Fresh ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cucumbers into quarters, running the cuts lengthwise.
Rub each piece with salt (in addition to the 2 tbsp above) and let stand for an hour.
2. In a bowl, mix together the finely chopped green onions, garlic, ginger, red pepper flakes, salt, and sugar.
3. Rinse the cucumbers lightly under running water.
4. Pack the cucumbers into a clean jar, ensuring they are fully covered by the mixture from step 2.
5. Pour water into the jar until it reaches just below the rim of the jar.
6. Allow the kimchi to sit at room temperature for at least 3 days before transferring it to the refrigerator. The longer it ferments, the more flavorful it becomes—up to 2-3 weeks is ideal.
